_comment: Publish map for winget archive/portable packages. winget installs these into a hashed per-package folder under %LOCALAPPDATA%\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages with a platform-suffixed exe and no PATH shim, which is hard to find and reference. publish-tools.ps1 copies the resolved exe into a predictable tools root (default C:\Tools\<subdir>\<targetExe>) so launchers and the WinSW service can point at a stable path. winget stays the source of truth for versions; re-run publish after 'winget upgrade'. Every wingetId here must be installed by some winget-*.json manifest (validate.ps1 enforces this).
